miwi        2007-02-27 13:13:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im/jabber        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    net-im/jabber/files  jabber.in patch-Makefile.in 
                         patch-configure patch-jabberd-Makefile.in 
                         patch-jsm-sessions.c 
                         patch-man-Makefile.in 
                         patch-man-jabberd.8.in 
                         patch-xdb_file-xdbfiletool.cc 
                         patch-xdb_sql-xdb_sql.cc pkg-deinstall.in

    net-im/jabber/files  jabberd.sh.in patch-jabberd_mio.c 
  Log:
  - Unbreak
  - Update to 1.6.0
  - Add support for openssl, mysql, postgresql
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  NOTES: Please read the UPDATING.
  
  PR:             109259
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
